name: ruby-rainbow
title: ruby-rainbow
summary: extension of Ruby String class enabling colored text on ANSI terminals
description:
extension of Ruby String class enabling colored text on ANSI terminals
Rainbow extends the ruby string class to enable coloring text on
ANSI terminals. It adds methods to the String class and allowing
the use offoreground and background color, bright, italic, underline,
blink, reverse, hide and reset on text for ANSI terminals.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-rainbow because extension of Ruby String class enabling colored text on ANSI terminals.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-rainbow as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-rainbow with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-rainbow --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
